ddls:
CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the announcement (e.g., Announcements & Nutritionists needed) */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Specific topic of the announcement */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the announcement has received */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who posted the announcement */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date when the announcement was posted */,
  "link" TEXT /* URL link to the full announcement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the announcement (e.g., active, expired, draft) */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applications or responses */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location or region where the job or consultancy is based */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for job opportunities */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills or qualifications for the role */,
  "application_link" TEXT /* Direct link for applying to the job or consultancy */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for further inquiries */,
  "is_highlighted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the announcement is highlighted or featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the author belongs to */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the author's organization website */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the author account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the author's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme (e.g., Announcements & Nutritionists needed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the theme (e.g., job, consultancy, research) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the theme was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the announcement being replied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user replying */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date when the reply was posted */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reply has been deleted */,
  "deleted_date" TEXT /* Date when the reply was deleted */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the reply has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the reply has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_announcement_id FOREIGN KEY ("announcement_id") REFERENCES announcements ("announcement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., consultant, organization admin) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Link to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography or description of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the announcement being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the announcement */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the announcement was viewed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for viewing (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the viewer for analytics purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_announcement_id FOREIGN KEY ("announcement_id") REFERENCES announcements ("announcement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the announcement related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, viewed) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the user */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_announcement_id FOREIGN KEY ("announcement_id") REFERENCES announcements ("announcement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the announcement being analyzed */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the announcement */,
  "total_replies" INTEGER /* Total number of replies for the announcement */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Calculated engagement rate based on views and replies */,
  "unique_views" INTEGER /* Number of unique views for the announcement */,
  "average_view_duration" REAL /* Average duration of views for the announcement */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate based on views and clicks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_announcement_id FOREIGN KEY ("announcement_id") REFERENCES announcements ("announcement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., consultant, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user-role mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
